posts.author: harry.shams (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Trying to use the Mind Map app on Monday.com, but running into trouble. Even though Mind Map (by Thought Flow) is installed, and even though I switched my Board View to Mind Map, the board still fails to load. Instead, my board floods with notifications from my Monday inbox. Any thoughts on a fix? How do I load the Mind Map software? Can follow up with screenshots if helpful

Thanks

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: As this is a 3rd party app - you are best contacting thoughflow directly. From the Marketplace, the contact email address is conact@thoughtflow.io . You can also go to their website and schedule a demo and with them or they are avaialble on +918897620060

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @harry.shams ,

I’m the developer of this app. Could you send screenshots to kranthi@thoughtflow.io ?
